narrative:
DOMINANT DRIVERS

1. Cross-asset commodity surge because copper up 3.9%, silver up 7.97%, oil up 2.97%, and gold up 0.53% simultaneously signal a real-asset demand wave overriding the narrative risk-off label
2. USD structural strength because H4 CSM ranks USD at 100 while DXY holds firm and CHF fades from 100 to 0 on H4, removing the classic risk-off safe haven confirmation
3. JPY fading momentum because CADJPY leads USDJPY at 0.91 correlation and JPY CSM drops from 60 on D1 to 39 on H4, undermining yen strength despite elevated VIX

PRICE CONFIRMS

AUDUSD and NZDUSD are lagging the commodity surge rather than leading it, consistent with AUD CSM fading from 79 to 15 and NZD fading to 0 on H4, suggesting the commodity bid is not translating into AUD or NZD strength yet. USDCHF correlation with EURUSD at -0.87 and AUDUSD at -0.86 confirms CHF is the pivotal safe-haven tell, and CHF fading on H4 rejects a clean risk-off read. EURJPY and GBPJPY clustering above 0.88 correlation with AUDJPY confirms JPY crosses are moving together, and the H4 buy signal on EURJPY at plus four is the highest-conviction directional read in the data.

REGIME

Mixed conflicted, because VIX at 18.38 up 6.92% and gold near record highs argue risk-off, but S&P500 at 7413 up 0.19% holds gains and CHF is fading on H4, denying safe-haven flow confirmation across currencies.

CONTRADICTIONS

1. CHF versus VIX: VIX surging 6.92% signals fear but CHF CSM collapses from 100 to 0 on H4, which should be impossible in a genuine risk-off episode and suggests equity hedging rather than currency safe-haven demand
2. AUD versus copper: Copper surging 3.88% historically lifts AUDUSD but AUD CSM fades from 79 to 15 on H4, meaning the commodity signal and the currency signal are directly opposed and one must resolve

TRADE IMPLICATIONS

Best: EURJPY up - H4 buy signal plus 4, JPY fading CSM, commodity surge reduces yen appeal - Conviction 6/10
Secondary: USDCHF up - CHF H4 CSM at zero, USD H4 CSM at 100, CHF safe-haven bid not materializing - Conviction 6/10
Avoid: AUDUSD - AUD CSM collapse contradicts copper surge, pair has no clean directional anchor
Watch: CHF CSM recovering on H4 toward 30 or above would invalidate both primary trades and confirm genuine

themes.theme: Iran tensions and geopolitical risk escalation
Risk-on sentiment from strong earnings and AI optimism
Chinese Yuan strength ahead of US-China summit
BoJ policy expectations and Yen weakness
Commodity price inflation across agriculture and energy

key_observation: Markets display bifurcated sentiment with geopolitical risk driving safe-haven demand and precious metals strength, offsetting positive earnings-driven risk-on momentum. USD steadies as CPI anticipation and Iran tensions create conflicting impulses. Commodity inflation pressures suggest potential stagflation concerns.
watch: US CPI release timing, Iran-US escalation developments, BoJ meeting outcome on May 12, US-China summit progress, crude Strait of Hormuz dynamics
